name: Jim's Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until soft and fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in sugar; cream well.
3. Add eggs one at a time, and melted chocolate, mixing thoroughly.
4. Add vanilla.
5. Gradually add the sifted flour.
6. Stir in chopped nuts (walnuts are also good).
7. Turn batter into a greased jelly-roll pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
9. Mix all ingredients for icing together in a bowl.
10. When brownies are cool, spread with chocolate icing.
Variation: Brownies made in blender:
1. Place eggs, vanilla, soft butter, sugar, and melted chocolate in blender container.
2. Cover and turn on the motor.
3. Blend until smooth, using a rubber spatula in the top of the mixture.
4. Pour over flour in a pan.
5. Stir; add nuts.
6. Bake.
